interpretation.finding: Structured event memory beats RAG by 47% absolute recall@k. The gain is concentrated in temporal-neighbor cases (average 100%). Strict recall@1 gain is 50%. Ablation: temporal-only gain 25%, causal-only gain 22%, combined gain 47%. Held-out calibrated abstention at threshold 1.25 has 79% accuracy, 75% positive recall, and 85% negative abstention.
interpretation.next_step: Add harder entity-conflict cases and then validate on non-synthetic dialogue before treating this as robust.

interpretation.finding: On the hand-authored dialogue smoke test, event memory reaches 100% recall@k versus 80% for RAG. The transferred evidence selector gets 80% positive recall and 100% negative abstention.
interpretation.next_step: Replace this smoke fixture with transcript-derived cases and keep the same gates.

interpretation.finding: The annotated transcript compiler runs end to end: 8 turns become 7 events, with event memory recall 100% versus RAG 67%. Evidence admission reaches 100% positive recall and 100% negative abstention. State resolution covers 4 cases at 100% accuracy with 0% false positives.
interpretation.next_step: Use this compiler on real transcript snippets and track source-turn provenance for every event.

interpretation.finding: The best held-out unigram-LM probe is unigram_like (NLL/token 4.810); heuristic morphology is 5.961. Decision: auxiliary_only with LM NLL gain -1.151 and boundary-F1 gain 57%. Cross-fold stability shows morphology win rate 0%, average LM gain -0.879, and stable-primary=False.
interpretation.next_step: Use morphology for auxiliary supervision or analysis, not as the primary tokenizer yet.

interpretation.finding: Heuristic morphology reaches 100% boundary F1 on the tiny gold fixture.
interpretation.next_step: Replace the tiny hand fixture with MorphoLex/CELEX-derived examples; this result is alignment-only.

interpretation.finding: State grounding gets 100% accuracy on 4 seed cases.
interpretation.next_step: Expand precondition, contradiction, figurative-language, and context-blindness cases.

interpretation.finding: Explicit event-state tracking gets 100% accuracy on 100 synthetic object-location cases, with 0% false positives on unknown objects.
interpretation.next_step: Port the same state annotations into transcript-derived dialogue fixtures.
